description: Generate JavaDoc HTML documentation for the 'DevUtils' Java project in Eclipse IDE. The DevUtils project is a utility library containing five Java classes across three packages: com.devutils.text (StringUtils, CaseFormat), com.devutils.math (MathUtils, Statistics), and com.devutils.collection (ListUtils). If the project is not in the workspace, import it from ~/eclipse-workspace/DevUtils. Use the Javadoc command located at /usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64/bin/javadoc. The documentation must include 'Protected' visibility for all packages and be exported to /home/ga/javadoc-output.
